sglang.title: Tiny print launch command with `shlex`
sglang.author: hnyls2002
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
With simply " ".join(cmd), the result may like this:
--json-model-override-args {"vocab_size": 131072} 
which cannot be executed by the shell.
Use shlex.join to fix it:
--json-model-override-args '{"vocab_size": 131072}'

sglang.title: [model-gateway][CI] Display benchmark results in GitHub Actions summary
sglang.author: slin1237
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Capture benchmark stdout to files using tee for all three benchmarks (request processing, tokenizer, tool parser)
Upload benchmark_output.txt as part of artifacts
Enhanced summary step to display actual benchmark results in collapsible sections using Details tags
Write summary to $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMAR

sglang.title: [model-gateway] perf: optimize observability logging for minimal CPU/memory overhead
sglang.author: slin1237
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Use borrowed string slices (&str) instead of owned Strings in event structs to eliminate heap allocations on the hot path
Add const TIME_FORMAT and DEFAULT_LOG_TARGET for static string usage
Pre-calculate filter string capacity to minimize reallocations
Add #[inline] hints on all hot path functions

sglang.title: [model-gateway]: optimize metrics for minimal CPU and memory overhead
sglang.author: slin1237
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Add string interning via DashMap to avoid repeated heap allocations for dynamic labels (model_id, worker URLs, paths)
Optimize record_streaming_metrics to use Arc::clone instead of String clones
Optimize remove_worker_metrics to allocate once and reuse Arc

Performance characteristics:

First occurr

vllm.title: [BugFix] Re-fix async multimodal cpu tensor race condition

#28706 fixed a race condition with async scheduling of multimodal models where reused CPU tensors weren't properly synchronized in GPUModelRunner's execute_model method, by ensuring the _preprocess method is included the async barrier context manager.
